childhood.familyBackground: Singer was born in New Jersey to a Jewish family. His father was a judge and his mother a teacher, valuing education and law.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 싱어는 뉴저지 유대인 가족에 태어났다. 그의 아버지는 판사이고 어머니는 교사였다.
childhood.earlyLife: Singer worked as a lawyer and then became a hedge fund manager. He founded Elliott Management, one of the world's largest hedge funds.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 싱어는 변호사로 일한 후 헤지펀드 관리자가 되었다.

careerTimeline.event: Founded Elliott Associates, later Elliott Management
careerTimeline.eventKo: Elliott Associates 설립, 나중에 Elliott Management가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Became major player in distressed debt and activist investing
careerTimeline.eventKo: 부실 채무 및 활동가적 투자의 주요 플레이어가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Achieved billionaire status through successful hedge fund management
careerTimeline.eventKo: 성공적인 헤지펀드 관리를 통해 억만장자 지위 달성

failures.description: Several activist positions faced backlash and underperformed market expectations
failures.descriptionKo: 여러 활동가적 입장이 반발에 직면하고 시장 기대를 미달
failures.lesson: Activist investing requires understanding company culture and stakeholder interests
failures.lessonKo: 활동가적 투자는 회사 문화 및 이해관계자 이익 이해가 필요하다

quotes.text: Smart investing requires identifying undervalued opportunities and creating value
quotes.textKo: 현명한 투자는 저평가된 기회를 식별하고 가치를 창출해야 한다

recommended.title: Fooled by Randomness
recommended.author: Nassim Taleb
recommended.note: Influenced his risk management and probabilistic thinking
recommended.noteKo: 그의 위험 관리 및 확률론적 사고에 영향을 미침

personalTraits.knownFor: Elliott Management founder; hedge fund leadership; activist investing expertise
personalTraits.knownForKo: Elliott Management 창립자; 헤지펀드 리더십; 활동가적 투자 전문성
personalTraits.philanthropy: Philanthropist supporting various charitable causes and education
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 다양한 자선 사업 및 교육을 지원하는 자선가
personalTraits.controversies: Faced criticism for activist investing tactics and positions on various corporate matters
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 활동가적 투자 전술 및 다양한 기업 문제에 대한 입장으로 인한 비판에 직면
